description_long: This is a stylized doll dressed in a full military uniform with a digital camouflage pattern in shades of green and brown. The doll features a helmet with a chin strap, a headset microphone, and a pair of goggles, giving it a modern soldier appearance. The uniform includes a tactical vest with pouches, a belt with additional gear, and gloves, all rendered in matching camouflage. The doll's face is anime-inspired, with large expressive eyes, a small mouth, and white spiky hair peeking out from under the helmet. Patches with flag insignias are visible on the shoulders and chest, adding to the authenticity of the military theme. The boots are sturdy and match the rest of the outfit, completing the look of a contemporary combat soldier.
description: A stylized military-themed doll with digital camouflage uniform, helmet, tactical gear, and anime-inspired facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's full uniform, helmet, headset, and expressive face with large eyes and white hair.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, headset microphone, and the detailed tactical gear on the belt and vest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, tactical vest, belt, and the flag patch on the back of the uniform.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the headset, glove details, and the side profile of the uniform and gear.
attribute_clothing_style: Modern military uniform with digital camouflage pattern in green and brown, tactical vest with pouches, utility belt, gloves, and combat boots, accessorized with a helmet and headset, inspired by contemporary armed forces attire.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs straight; head facing forward, body in a neutral, static position.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open eyes and a small, closed mouth, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, spiky white hair protruding from under the helmet, with visible tufts around the sides and back.
